releases.summary: Introduces saved views and a significantly faster global search experience, alongside a fix for large export timeouts.

updates.title: Saved Views
updates.body: Save any filtered dashboard configuration and share it with your team, so recurring analyses are one click away.

updates.title: Faster Global Search
updates.body: Cross-platform search now returns results up to 3x faster and includes patient program and payer name matches.

updates.title: Large Export Reliability
updates.body: Resolved an issue where exports spanning very wide date ranges could occasionally time out.
